stories.description: Add subscription_tier column to companies table + wire through sql-auth.ts mapper. ALTER TABLE companies ADD COLUMN subscription_tier VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'Records Vault' AFTER subscription_status. Update SqlCompanyRow interface and mapCompanyRowToApiCompany() in server/lib/sql-auth.ts.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Migration 027 applies without error and column exists with default Records Vault
mapCompanyRowToApiCompany returns subscriptionTier field, null defaults to Records Vault

stories.description: Add Stripe columns (stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id, subscription_period_end) to companies table + wire through sql-auth.ts mapper + add Stripe fields to Company interface in types.ts.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Migration 028 applies and all 3 nullable columns exist in companies table
Company interface in types.ts has stripeCustomerId, stripeSubscriptionId, subscriptionPeriodEnd fields
mapCompanyRowToApiCompany returns stripeCustomerId, stripeSubscriptionId, subscriptionPeriodEnd

stories.description: Add QuickBooks OAuth token storage table. CREATE TABLE quickbooks_tokens with id, company_id (UNIQUE), realm_id, access_token, refresh_token, token_type, expires_at, created_at, updated_at.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Migration 029 creates quickbooks_tokens table with UNIQUE constraint on company_id
DOWN migration drops table cleanly

stories.description: Add GPS positions table. CREATE TABLE gps_positions with id, company_id, vehicle_id, driver_id, latitude DECIMAL(10,7), longitude DECIMAL(10,7), speed, heading, recorded_at, provider, provider_vehicle_id, created_at. Index on (company_id, vehicle_id, recorded_at DESC).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Migration 030 creates gps_positions table with compound index
Can insert and query positions ordered by recorded_at DESC

stories.description: Create Stripe payment service. npm install stripe. Implement createCheckoutSession, createBillingPortalSession, handleWebhookEvent with tier-to-price mapping, DB updates on webhook events, idempotent event processing, and graceful fallback when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY missing.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: createCheckoutSession returns valid session URL with correct price ID for each of 4 tiers
handleWebhookEvent updates companies table on checkout.session.completed, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.deleted
Webhook is idempotent â€” same event.id processed twice does not duplicate DB updates
Missing STRIPE_SECRET_KEY returns { available: false, reason: no_api_key }
Invalid webhook signature returns error without crash

stories.description: Implement Twilio SMS in notification delivery service. npm install twilio. Replace SMS stub in notification-delivery.service.ts with real Twilio client.messages.create(). Graceful fallback when Twilio not configured.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: SMS channel sends via Twilio when configured, returns SENT with message SID
Missing Twilio config returns { status: FAILED, sync_error: Twilio not configured }
Recipients without phone numbers are skipped, not errored
Existing email delivery tests still pass unchanged (regression)

stories.description: Create GPS provider interface + Samsara adapter. Provider-agnostic GpsProvider interface with getVehicleLocations/getVehicleLocation. SamsaraAdapter calls Samsara Fleet API with 5s timeout, 60s cache, mock fallback. Factory function getGpsProvider() returns adapter based on GPS_PROVIDER env var.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GpsProvider interface is provider-agnostic with no Samsara-specific types
Samsara adapter returns parsed GpsPosition array from API, with 5s timeout and 60s cache
Missing SAMSARA_API_TOKEN returns mock positions with isMock: true
Factory returns SamsaraAdapter for samsara, throws for unknown provider

stories.description: Create QuickBooks OAuth service. npm install intuit-oauth. Implement getAuthorizationUrl, handleCallback (token exchange + AES-256-GCM encryption), getClient (decrypt + refresh), syncInvoiceToQBO, syncBillToQBO, getConnectionStatus. Graceful fallback when not configured.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: getAuthorizationUrl returns valid Intuit OAuth URL with correct client_id and redirect_uri
handleCallback exchanges auth code, encrypts tokens with AES-256-GCM, stores in quickbooks_tokens table
getClient decrypts tokens, refreshes if expired, re-encrypts and stores new tokens
syncInvoiceToQBO creates Invoice via Intuit API with correct field mapping
Token encrypt/decrypt roundtrip preserves original token value
Missing env vars returns { available: false, reason: no_api_key }

stories.description: Remove weather feature flag. Modify weather.service.ts to remove WEATHER_ENABLED check, keep WEATHER_API_KEY presence check following FMCSA pattern. Update tests to remove WEATHER_ENABLED references.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Weather works when WEATHER_API_KEY set (no WEATHER_ENABLED needed)
Returns { available: false, reason: no_api_key } when key not set
No reference to WEATHER_ENABLED remains in codebase

stories.description: Add Stripe webhook + checkout routes. POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session (requireAuth), POST /api/stripe/create-billing-portal (requireAuth), POST /api/stripe/webhook (NO auth, raw body). Webhook route registered BEFORE express.json() in index.ts.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session returns 200 with sessionId and url when Stripe configured
POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session returns 401 without auth token
POST /api/stripe/webhook returns 200 on valid event, 400 on invalid signature
Webhook endpoint accessible without auth token (public)

stories.description: Replace QuickBooks 501 stub with real routes. Create server/routes/quickbooks.ts with GET /api/quickbooks/auth-url, GET /api/quickbooks/callback, POST /api/quickbooks/sync-invoice, POST /api/quickbooks/sync-bill, GET /api/quickbooks/status. Remove 501 stub from accounting.ts.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: 501 stub removed from accounting.ts
GET /api/quickbooks/auth-url returns OAuth URL when configured, 503 when not
POST /api/quickbooks/sync-invoice syncs invoice and returns QBO reference ID
All routes enforce requireAuth + requireTenant

stories.description: Add GPS live tracking route. GET /api/tracking/live (requireAuth) and POST /api/tracking/webhook (X-GPS-API-Key header auth). Live route calls getGpsProvider() and stores positions in gps_positions table. Existing GET /api/loads/tracking unchanged.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GET /api/tracking/live returns positions from GPS provider, stores in DB
POST /api/tracking/webhook validates X-GPS-API-Key header, rejects invalid/missing
Existing GET /api/loads/tracking still works unchanged (backward compatible)

stories.description: Wire legacy sendNotification in server/helpers.ts to real notification-delivery service. Replace logger-only stub with async call to deliverNotification(). Fire-and-forget pattern.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: sendNotification calls deliverNotification with channel email and correct recipients
Notification failure does NOT throw (fire-and-forget, catches errors)
Empty emails array is a no-op

stories.description: Update .env.example with all new integration environment variables. Add Stripe (6 vars), Twilio (3 vars), QuickBooks (5 vars), GPS (3 vars) sections. Remove WEATHER_ENABLED.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All integration env vars documented with descriptions and required/optional status
No real API keys or secrets in the file

stories.description: Clean up IFTA client-side stub comment in services/dispatchIntelligence.ts. Update comment to accurately describe server-side IFTA calculation. netTaxDue = 0 stays.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Comment accurately describes server-side IFTA calculation via /api/accounting/ifta-summary
netTaxDue = 0 unchanged and existing IFTA tests pass

stories.description: Replace Auth.tsx payment form with Stripe Checkout redirect. Remove cardNumber/cardExpiry/cardCVC state vars and inline inputs. Add Subscribe with Stripe button and Start Free Trial button. Handle Stripe return URL with session_id verification.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: No input for card number, expiry, or CVC exists in rendered output (PCI compliance)
Subscribe with Stripe button calls checkout session API with successUrl and cancelUrl
Start Free Trial button bypasses payment, logs in with trial status
When Stripe not configured, payment step auto-falls through to trial
Existing signup flow tests still pass (regression)

stories.description: Add subscription management and QuickBooks connection to CompanyProfile. Billing section with tier badge, status, period end. Manage Subscription and Connect QuickBooks buttons with redirect. Hide sections when not configured.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Billing section shows current tier name and status badge
Manage Subscription button calls billing portal API and redirects
Connect QuickBooks button calls auth-url API and redirects
Sections hidden when API returns 503 (not configured)

stories.description: Update GlobalMapViewEnhanced to consume live GPS data from /api/tracking/live. Poll every 30s, merge live positions with static data, pulsing indicator for live positions, cleanup on unmount.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Map shows live GPS positions when API returns data, updates every 30 seconds
Fallback to static data when GPS provider not configured (no visual regression)
Polling stops on component unmount (cleanup â€” no memory leak)

stories.description: Create subscription tier enforcement middleware. requireTier(...allowedTiers) factory checks subscription_tier + subscription_status from companies table. Allows active/trial, blocks past_due or wrong tier. Caches per-request.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Allowed tier + active status calls next()
Disallowed tier returns 403 with required_tiers, current_tier, upgrade_url
Past_due status returns 403 regardless of tier
Missing tier defaults to Records Vault
Tier lookup cached per-request (1 DB query even with multiple requireTier calls)

stories.description: Apply tier gates to premium routes. Add requireTier() middleware to AI endpoints (Automation Pro+), fleet management (Fleet Core+), enterprise analytics (Fleet Command). Records Vault base tier remains ungated.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AI endpoints return 403 for Records Vault tier, 200 for Automation Pro
Base CRUD endpoints (loads, quotes, invoices) accessible by Records Vault tier (regression)
GPS tracking returns 403 for Records Vault and Automation Pro, 200 for Fleet Core+
